languageDescription: Choose the language for the Paperclip interface.

profile.selectCompanyBeforeUpload: Select a company before uploading a profile avatar.
profile.selectCompanyToUpload: Select a company to upload an avatar into Paperclip storage.
profile.storedInPaperclip: Stored in Paperclip file storage for {{companyName}}.
profile.controlHowYourAccountAppears: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
profile.clickAvatarToUpload: Click the avatar to upload a new image.
profile.shownInSidebar: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.
profile.emailManagedByAuth: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.

instance.title: General
instance.description: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.

deploymentAndAuth.title: Deployment and auth
deploymentAndAuth.localTrustedDescription: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
deploymentAndAuth.publicDescription: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
deploymentAndAuth.privateDescription: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.

censorUsername.title: Censor username in logs
censorUsername.description: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.

keyboardShortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
keyboardShortcuts.description: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.

backupRetention.title: Backup retention
backupRetention.description: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.

aiFeedback.title: AI feedback sharing
aiFeedback.description: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
aiFeedback.noDefault: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
aiFeedback.denyDescription: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
aiFeedback.devNote: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.

signOut.title: Sign out
signOut.description: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

heartbeats.disableAllConfirmation: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?
heartbeats.noSchedulerHeartbeatsMatch: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.
heartbeats.agentsWithTimerHeartbeat: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.

plugin.author: Author
plugin.configureFromEnvironments: Configure this plugin from Company Environments.
plugin.environmentRuntimeSettings: registers environment runtime settings there so credentials stay company-scoped instead of instance-global.
plugin.noSettingsRequired: This plugin does not require any settings.
plugin.runtimeDashboardDescription: Worker process, scheduled jobs, and webhook deliveries
plugin.runtimeDiagnosticsUnavailable: Runtime diagnostics are unavailable right now.
plugin.healthChecksRunWhenReady: Health checks run once the plugin is ready.
plugin.selectCompanyToConfigureFolders: Select a company to configure this plugin's local folders.
plugin.failedToLoadLocalFolderSettings: Failed to load local folder settings.
plugin.localFolderSavedNeedsAttention: Local folder saved, but validation still needs attention.
plugin.localFolderMustBeAbsolute: Local folder must be a full absolute path.

experimental.lookbackHoursInvalid: Lookback hours must be a whole number from 1 to 720.
experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
experimental.enableEnvironmentsDescription: Show environment management in company settings and allow project and agent environment assignment controls.
experimental.enableIsolatedWorkspacesDescription: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
experimental.autoRestartDevServerDescription: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
experimental.autoCreateIssueRecoveryTasksDescription: Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery issues for issue dependency chains found inside the configured lookback window.
experimental.recoveryTasksMatch: {{count}} recovery task matches the last {{hours}} hours.
experimental.recoveryTasksMatch_plural: {{count}} recovery tasks match the last {{hours}} hours.
experimental.noRecoveryTasksNow: No recovery tasks would be created right now. Auto-recovery can still run for future liveness incidents in this window.
experimental.findingsOutsideLookback: {{count}} current finding is outside the configured lookback and will not be touched.
experimental.findingsOutsideLookback_plural: {{count}} current findings are outside the configured lookback and will not be touched.

instanceAccess.title: Instance Access
instanceAccess.description: Search users, manage instance-admin status, and control which companies they can access.
instanceAccess.adminRequired: Instance admin access is required to manage users.
instanceAccess.selectUser: Select a user to inspect instance access.
instanceAccess.companyAccessHint: Toggle company membership for this user. New access defaults to an active operator membership.

companyAccess.title: Company Access
companyAccess.description: Manage company user memberships, membership status, and explicit permission grants for {{companyName}}.
companyAccess.instanceAdminNote: This account can manage access here through instance-admin privileges, but it does not currently hold an active company membership.

humans.title: Humans
humans.description: Manage human company memberships, status, and grants here.

pendingJoins.title: Pending human joins
pendingJoins.description: Review human join requests before they become active company members.

companyAccess.noMemberships: No user memberships found for this company yet.

editMember.title: Edit member
editMember.description: Update company role, membership status, and explicit grants for {{name}}.
editMember.grantsDescription: Roles provide implicit grants automatically. Explicit grants below are only for overrides and extra access that should persist even if the role changes.
editMember.noImplicitGrants: No role is selected, so this member has no implicit grants right now.
editMember.includedImplicitly: Included implicitly by the {{role}} role. Add an explicit grant only if it should stay after the role changes.

removeMember.title: Remove member
removeMember.description: Archive {{name}} and move active assignments before hiding this user from assignment fields.

companyAccess.selectCompany: Select a company to manage access.
companyAccess.permissionError: You do not have permission to manage company members.

environments.title: Company Environments
environments.description: Define reusable execution targets for projects, issue workspaces, and remote-capable adapters.
environments.disabled: Enable Environments in instance experimental settings to manage company execution targets.
environments.selectCompany: Select a company to manage environments.
environments.info: Environment choices use the same adapter support matrix as agent defaults. SSH is always available for remote-managed adapters, and sandbox environments appear only when a run-capable sandbox provider plugin is installed.
environments.noEnvironments: No environments saved for this company yet.
environments.name: Name
environments.nameHint: Operator-facing name for this execution target.
environments.descriptionHint: Optional note about what this machine is for.
environments.driverHint: Local runs on this host. SSH stores a remote machine target. Sandbox stores plugin-backed provider config on the shared environment seam.
environments.hostHint: DNS name or IP address for the remote machine.
environments.remoteWorkspacePathHint: Absolute path that Paperclip will verify during SSH connection tests.
environments.privateKeyHint: Optional PEM private key. Leave blank to rely on the server's SSH agent or default keychain.
environments.knownHostsHint: Optional known_hosts block used when strict host key checking is enabled.
environments.strictHostKeyCheckingHint: Keep this on unless you deliberately want probe-time host key acceptance disabled.
environments.providerHint: Installed run-capable sandbox provider plugins appear here.
environments.noProviderConfig: This provider does not declare additional configuration fields.

company.title: Company Settings
company.companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
company.descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
company.logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
company.brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
company.enterWholeNumber: Enter a whole number from 1 to {{max}}.
company.requireBoardApproval: Require board approval for new hires
company.requireBoardApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
company.generateInviteSnippet: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
company.inviteHintIcon: Creates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and renders a copy-ready prompt.
company.importExportMoved: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the
company.archiveDescription: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
company.archiveConfirm: Archive company "{{name}}"? It will be hidden from the sidebar.
company.noCompanySelected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.

preview.selectFile: Select a file to preview its contents.
preview.binaryUnavailable: Binary asset preview is not available for this file type.

companyImport.selectCompany: Select a company to import into.

source.title: Import source
source.description: Choose a GitHub repo or upload a local Paperclip zip package.

companyImport.localZipHelp: Upload a .zip exported directly from Paperclip. Re-zipped archives created by Finder, Explorer, or other zip tools may not import correctly.
companyImport.githubUrlHint: Repo tree path or blob URL to COMPANY.md (e.g. github.com/owner/repo/tree/main/company).
companyImport.targetHint: Import into this company or create a new one.
companyImport.newCompanyNameHint: Optional override. Leave blank to use the package name.
companyImport.collisionStrategyHint: Board imports can rename, skip, or replace matching company content.

preview.selectFile: Select a file to preview its contents.
preview.binaryUnavailable: Binary asset preview is not available for this file type.

error.emptyZip: No package files were found in the selected zip archive.
